info.name: OpenCatalogi - schema.org Structured-Data Discoverability
info.description:
API-only contract tests for the schema.org JSON-LD discoverability surface (schema-org-dataset-discoverability change, SDD-001..004). Covers the content-negotiated publication representation (Accept: application/ld+json and ?format=schema), the catalog DataCatalog node, the elected schema:Dataset shape with DataDownload distributions + includedInDataCatalog, and the single-document / CORS embedding contract. Per the Playwright-UI-only / Newman-API convention this surface has no browser UI of OpenCatalogi's own (the embedding frontend is external) and is asserted here.

Variables:
- baseUrl: instance base URL (default http://localhost:8080)
- catalogSlug: a public catalog slug (set per environment)
- publicationId: a publicly visible publication UUID in that catalog
- electedCatalogSlug: a catalog that elects schema:Dataset (schemaOrgDataset=true)
- electedPublicationId: a visible publication with >=1 attachment in the elected catalog

item.name: SDD-001 Publication as schema.org JSON-LD (Accept header)

exec: pm.test('@type derived from x-schema-org marker', () => typeof doc['@type'] === 'string' && doc['@type'].length > 0);
pm.test('carries name, url, dateModified', () => doc.name !== undefined && doc.url !== undefined && doc.dateModified !== undefined);
pm.test('single document (no result envelope)', () => doc.results === undefined && doc.total === undefined);

item.name: SDD-001 Publication as schema.org JSON-LD (?format=schema fallback)

exec: pm.test('dataset is an array of refs', () => Array.isArray(doc.dataset));
pm.test('every dataset entry has an @id URL', () => doc.dataset.every(d => typeof d['@id'] === 'string'));

item.name: SDD-003 Elected publication carries Dataset + DataDownload + includedInDataCatalog

exec: pm.test('Google Dataset Search required: name + description', () => typeof doc.name === 'string' && typeof doc.description === 'string');

pm.test('>=1 distribution typed DataDownload with contentUrl', () => Array.isArray(doc.distribution) && doc.distribution.length >= 1 && doc.distribution[0]['@type'] === 'DataDownload' && typeof doc.distribution[0].contentUrl === 'string');

item.name: SDD-004 Preflight CORS on the catalog schema endpoint
